title: Draft: 11L NorMuon + LeakyReLU^2 + Full GPTQ + Delayed PPM
body:
## Summary
- Add a draft record-folder snapshot for a stacked 11L method built on the NorMuon base.
- Include only the minimal code needed for early review: `train_gpt.py`, `trie_bench.c`, and `README.md`.
- Intentionally omit results, logs, and `submission.json` until the validation sweep is finished.

## What this draft includes
- NorMuon optimizer path from the current 11L base.
- LeakyReLU^2 MLP activation option.
- Full GPTQ export path.
- Delayed outside-context-only PPM final-eval path with the C trie helper.
- Kanzi-first compression fallback chain.

## What this draft does not claim
- No record claim yet.
- No 3-seed validation yet.
- No `0.005` nat significance claim yet.

## Test plan
- [ ] Finish the validation sweep for the stacked method.
- [ ] Add logs and `submission.json` if the stack validates.
- [ ] Verify the required `0.005` nat improvement at `p < 0.01`.


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
